# Learning-Augmented Combinatorial Optimization {#sec-learned-opt}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Understand how ML can accelerate branch-and-bound solvers
- Apply learned branching rules and primal heuristics in MIP
- Use graph neural networks to encode combinatorial problem structure
- Evaluate learned vs. classical heuristics on benchmark problems
:::

## Introduction

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
